title: Table Item
description: A leaf item type that renders tabular data. It may render static columns/rows or bind to a document-scoped connection via connectionId and carry its own query (E4-S2). A table never has children.

title.description: Optional heading rendered above the table.

connectionId.description: Optional id of a document-scoped connection this table draws its rows from (E4-S2). Must match a declared connection; validated by the resolver.

query.description: Optional query passed to the bound connection. Parameter values may reference variables ($var typed bindings / ${} string templates), filled by the resolver's interpolation pass before binding. Requires connectionId.

rows.description: Static row data. Each row is an array of cell strings aligned to columns.
